title: Explain magic constant 6 in page scroll calculation
description: File: tui/src/event.rs, lines 701-707 — page scroll size is calculated as terminal_size.1.saturating_sub(6). The constant 6 accounts for borders/input/status line height but is unexplained. Document why 6 is the correct offset so future contributors understand if terminal layout changes would require adjustment.
close_reason: deferred to backlog; P3/P4 style issues, not blocking epic completion
